# Code review for account creation and login (2026-03-21 21:47Z)

_**User**_

Perform a strict code review of this git branch for account creation/login changes with focus on: duplicated/unnecessary code, bad engineering practices/SOLID violations, code smells, insecure auth-related code, missing tests. Steps: identify changed files from git diff against main/master (pick correct base), inspect those files plus related auth utils/components/backend endpoints, and report findings ordered by severity. For each finding provide file path and concise rationale and recommended fix direction. Also list testing gaps. Return only findings and evidence, no code edits.
